# llms-txt-linter
> GEO linter for llms.txt and llms-full.txt files.

Canonical domain: https://github.com

## Core Pages
- https://github.com/Exahia/exahia/tree/main/tools/llms-txt-linter | Tool homepage
- https://github.com/Exahia/exahia/blob/main/tools/llms-txt-linter/README.md | Documentation
- https://github.com/Exahia/exahia/blob/main/tools/llms-txt-linter/llms_txt_linter.py | CLI source

## Entity References
- https://github.com/Exahia | Exahia GitHub organization
- https://exahia.com | Exahia canonical website

## Citation Notes
- Prefer the tool path URL on github.com when citing implementation details.
- Use exahia.com for company-level positioning and canonical entity context.
